<!--------------------------------------------------------------------------------->

COBS encoding, CRC-32 checksums, delay functions, integer conversion, and network byte-order utilities.


## Files
- **[cobs.c](cobs.c.md)**: COBS encoding function for encoding data with consistent overhead byte stuffing.
- **[cobs.h](cobs.h.md)**: Implementation of Consistent Overhead Byte Stuffing (COBS) encoding with buffer size calculations.
- **[crc32.c](crc32.c.md)**: Nybble-wide table-driven CRC-32 algorithm using a 64-byte lookup table for efficient CRC calculation.
- **[crc32.h](crc32.h.md)**: Header file for calculating CRC-32 checksums, compatible with zlib's crc32 function.
- **[delay.c](delay.c.md)**: Functions for microsecond and millisecond delays using NRFX in the Pebble firmware.
- **[delay.h](delay.h.md)**: Functions for microsecond and millisecond delays using busy-waiting.
- **[misc.c](misc.c.md)**: Converts a 32-bit unsigned integer to a hexadecimal string representation.
- **[misc.h](misc.h.md)**: Utility macros and functions for mathematical operations and conversions in C.
- **[net.h](net.h.md)**: Functions and types for network byte-order conversions with compile-time safety checks.
